description.es: Node.js 26.0.0 sale stable con Temporal por default, V8 14.6 y Undici 8. Next.js 16.3 canary 11 corrige doble-encoding en pathname y reload del dev mode. Storybook 10.4 alpha 17 mete contenido agéntico de onboarding y reemplaza @storybook/docs-mdx por una impl inline. web-features 3.26 promueve contrast-color a Baseline.
description.en: Node.js 26.0.0 ships stable with Temporal on by default, V8 14.6 and Undici 8. Next.js 16.3 canary 11 fixes pathname double-encoding and a dev-mode reload bug. Storybook 10.4 alpha 17 lands agentic onboarding sample content and replaces @storybook/docs-mdx with an inline implementation. web-features 3.26 promotes contrast-color to Baseline newly available.
description.fr: Node.js 26.0.0 sort en stable avec Temporal activé par défaut, V8 14.6 et Undici 8. Next.js 16.3 canary 11 corrige le double-encodage de pathname et un bug de reload du mode dev. Storybook 10.4 alpha 17 ajoute du contenu agentique d'onboarding et remplace @storybook/docs-mdx par une implémentation inline. web-features 3.26 promeut contrast-color en Baseline.

text.fr: Next.js 16.3 canary 11: fix double-encodage du pathname

title.es: Node.js 26.0.0 stable: Temporal por default y V8 14.6
title.en: Node.js 26.0.0 stable: Temporal by default and V8 14.6
title.fr: Node.js 26.0.0 stable: Temporal par défaut et V8 14.6

body_html.es: Salió la major stable. Highlights: Temporal habilitado por default (adiós workarounds de Date), V8 a 14.6.202.33 con Map.prototype.getOrInsert() e Iterator.concat(), Undici 8.0.2 y soporte de --max-heap-size. Breaking: removidos http.Server.prototype.writeHeader() y los streams legacy (_stream_wrap, _stream_readable, etc.), GCC mínimo 13.2 y se cae soporte de Python 3.9. Locura cósmica para los que armamos build pipelines: revisá tus toolchains antes del bump.
body_html.en: The stable major is out. Highlights: Temporal enabled by default (so long, Date hacks), V8 bumped to 14.6.202.33 with Map.prototype.getOrInsert() and Iterator.concat(), Undici 8.0.2 and a new --max-heap-size CLI flag. Breaking: http.Server.prototype.writeHeader() and legacy stream modules (_stream_wrap, _stream_readable, etc.) are removed, GCC minimum bumped to 13.2 and Python 3.9 support dropped. If you maintain build pipelines, audit your toolchains before bumping.
body_html.fr: La majeure stable est sortie. Au menu: Temporal activé par défaut, V8 14.6.202.33 avec Map.prototype.getOrInsert() et Iterator.concat(), Undici 8.0.2 et un nouveau flag --max-heap-size. Breaking: http.Server.prototype.writeHeader() et les modules streams legacy (_stream_wrap, _stream_readable) supprimés, GCC minimum à 13.2 et fin du support Python 3.9.

title.es: Next.js 16.3.0-canary.11: fix de double-encoding en pathname y reload del dev mode
title.en: Next.js 16.3.0-canary.11: pathname double-encoding fix and dev-mode reload
title.fr: Next.js 16.3.0-canary.11: fix double-encodage pathname et reload mode dev

body_html.es: La canary 16.3.0-canary.11 corrige el double-encoding de partes del pathname en el parsing de client params y resuelve el reload de dev mode con error al volver con back. Si tenías rutas con caracteres especiales o reportabas state freaky en navegación, este es tu fix.
body_html.en: Canary 16.3.0-canary.11 fixes double-encoding of URL pathname parts in client param parsing and resolves a dev-mode reload-and-error on back navigation. If you had routes with special characters or reported flaky back-nav state, this is your fix.
body_html.fr: La canary 16.3.0-canary.11 corrige le double-encodage des parties du pathname dans le parsing des params client et résout le reload-with-error en navigation arrière en mode dev.

title.es: Storybook 10.4.0-alpha.17: docs-mdx inline + soporte TanStack React
title.en: Storybook 10.4.0-alpha.17: inline docs-mdx + TanStack React support
title.fr: Storybook 10.4.0-alpha.17: docs-mdx inline + support TanStack React

body_html.es: El alpha 17 reemplaza @storybook/docs-mdx por una implementación inline, suma soporte para el package TanStack React y mete onboarding agéntico que mantiene contenido de muestra. Mejoras de UI en el copy-prompt display. Va perfilando el 10.4 con foco en la pipeline agéntica.
body_html.en: Alpha 17 replaces @storybook/docs-mdx with an inline implementation, adds TanStack React package support, and ships agentic onboarding that keeps sample content for users. UI fixes for the copy-prompt display. The 10.4 line keeps doubling down on agentic flows.
body_html.fr: L'alpha 17 remplace @storybook/docs-mdx par une implémentation inline, ajoute le support du package TanStack React et un onboarding agentique qui conserve le contenu d'exemple.

title.es: TanStack Vue Router 1.169.2 y stack Start
title.en: TanStack Vue Router 1.169.2 and Start stack
title.fr: TanStack Vue Router 1.169.2 et stack Start

body_html.es: Drop coordinado de la línea Vue/Start: @tanstack/vue-router@1.169.2, @tanstack/vue-start@1.167.57, @tanstack/start-server-core@1.167.30, @tanstack/start-plugin-core@1.169.19 y los servidores de start-static-server-functions y storage-context. La línea sigue iterando rápido con publicaciones diarias por el bot.
body_html.en: Coordinated drop on the Vue/Start line: @tanstack/vue-router@1.169.2, @tanstack/vue-start@1.167.57, @tanstack/start-server-core@1.167.30, @tanstack/start-plugin-core@1.169.19 plus start-static-server-functions and storage-context servers. The line keeps shipping daily.

title.es: Storybook 10.4.0-alpha.16: automigración para RN devices y self-healing CLI
title.en: Storybook 10.4.0-alpha.16: RN device automigration and self-healing CLI
title.fr: Storybook 10.4.0-alpha.16: automigration devices RN et CLI self-healing

body_html.es: Alpha previo del mismo día: automigración para addons de devices en React Native, mejoras en la generación del entrypoint RN y observabilidad del scoring del CLI agéntico self-healing. Si venís migrando proyectos RN a Storybook 10.4, este alpha te ahorra trabajo manual.
body_html.en: Same-day earlier alpha: automigration for React Native device addons, RN entrypoint generation improvements, and self-healing agentic CLI scoring observability. If you're migrating RN projects to Storybook 10.4, this alpha saves manual work.
body_html.fr: Alpha plus tôt le même jour: automigration pour les addons devices React Native, améliorations de la génération de l'entrypoint RN et observabilité du scoring CLI agentique self-healing.

title.es: web-features 3.26.0: contrast-color promovido a Baseline newly
title.en: web-features 3.26.0: contrast-color promoted to Baseline newly

body_html.es: El paquete oficial de Baseline mete dos features nuevas (OpaqueRange y <usermedia>) y, sobre todo, promueve contrast-color() a Baseline newly available. Para los que venimos pidiendo paridad cross-browser en color de texto sobre fondos dinámicos: esto es ENORME, ya podés codear contrast-color con menos polyfills.
body_html.en: The official Baseline package adds two new features (OpaqueRange and <usermedia>) and — bigger picture — promotes contrast-color() to Baseline newly available. For folks who've been asking for cross-browser parity on dynamic text contrast: this is huge, you can code contrast-color() with fewer polyfills now.
body_html.fr: Le paquet officiel Baseline ajoute deux features (OpaqueRange et <usermedia>) et surtout promeut contrast-color() en Baseline newly available.

notable_trends.es: Node 26 stable + Temporal default = año donde por fin sacás moment.js y date-fns para fechas básicas.
notable_trends.en: Node 26 stable with Temporal on by default = the year you finally drop moment.js and date-fns for basic date work.
notable_trends.fr: Node 26 stable avec Temporal par défaut = l'année où tu enlèves enfin moment.js et date-fns pour le basique.

notable_trends.es: Storybook 10.4 va al hueso con onboarding y CLIs agénticos. Tooling con feedback loop, no solo previews.
notable_trends.en: Storybook 10.4 leans hard into agentic onboarding and CLIs. Tooling with feedback loops, not just preview surfaces.
notable_trends.fr: Storybook 10.4 mise à fond sur l'onboarding et les CLIs agentiques. Du tooling avec boucle de feedback.
